# Pull Request

Thanks for taking the time to improve Resume Analyzer.

## Summary

Describe:

- What changed
- Why the change was needed
- The high-level implementation approach

## Related Issues

Closes #

Fixes #

Related #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Chore

## Testing

Describe what you tested, how you tested it, and the expected outcome.

## Manual Verification

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Frontend works
- [ ] Backend works
- [ ] Authentication verified
- [ ] Resume upload works
- [ ] Report generation works
- [ ] History works
- [ ] Temporary uploads are cleaned up
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] No build warnings

## Screenshots

Attach screenshots for UI changes if applicable.

## Documentation

Did this change require updates to any of the following?

- [ ] `README.md`
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] `SECURITY.md`
- [ ] Environment variables
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Architecture

## Security Considerations

Does this change affect any of the following?

- Authentication
- Authorization
- File uploads
- Environment variables
- Third-party integrations
- Sensitive data

If yes, explain the impact and any mitigation.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows project style
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] No unrelated changes
- [ ] Conventional Commit used
